data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"fdeb-4c03","generatedAt":"2026-04-17T14:47:38Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Brainstorm UX probe loop: static baseline for UI feature detection","description":"Extend brainstorm Phase 1 with a Surface probe dimension, UI intent classifier on the confirmed Understanding Summary, a static UX probe set that fires once per UI epic, a loop-back state machine so newly-surfaced intent gaps return to Tell Me More, a top-level anti-redundancy directive, and a non-interactive deferral path that emits ui_probes:deferred. Follow-on epic aaa1-7100 later replaces static probes with dynamic retrieval from the reference corpus.","successCriteria":["SC1: Phase 1 Step 2 probe table includes 7th 'Surface' dimension; Understanding Summary renders Surface bullet.","SC2: UI intent detection via keyword first-pass (configurable lexicon) + haiku classifier on ambiguous, with classifier-failure fall-through.","SC3: When UI-detected and ux_probe_fired flag unset, static UX probe set runs once (3 probes) and sets flag at $ARTIFACTS_DIR/ux-probe-fired-<epic-id>.","SC4: Phase 1 Gate Step 2 + UX probe checkpoint loop back to Tell Me More on intent gap; termination requires empty gap list AND same-turn Summary confirmation.","SC5: Top-level anti-redundancy directive in SKILL.md (semantic + codebase check before any question).","SC6: Non-UI bounded to one keyword scan + zero classifier calls when unambiguous.","SC7: BRAINSTORM_INTERACTIVE=false skips probes, emits INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED, tags ui_probes:deferred.","SC8: End-to-end dogfooding test on UI seed stubs haiku classifier to 'ui' and asserts Surface bullet + 3 probes asked + probe answers in ticket description."]},"stories":[{"id":"2161-b788","title":"As a developer using /dso:brainstorm, I see Phase 1 probe the Surface dimension and include it in the Understanding Summary","description":"Add 7th Surface dimension to Phase 1 Step 2 probe table and extend Summary schema with Surface bullet. Update existing brainstorm fixtures that assume 6 dimensions.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Phase 1 Step 2 has 7th 'Surface' probe-table row.","Understanding Summary renders Surface bullet alongside Problem/Users/Scope/Success.","Progressive validation test asserts Surface in Summary schema block.","Existing 6-dimension assertions in tests/skills/ and tests/scripts/ are enumerated and updated.","Unit tests written and passing."],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Preserve existing Phase 1 Step 2 directives and Phase 1 Gate structure.","[Residual references] Enumerate existing brainstorm tests before editing SKILL.md."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC1"},{"id":"7616-cd63","title":"As a developer using /dso:brainstorm, UI-intent detection routes the static UX probe set for UI-facing epics","description":"Insert Phase 1 Step 2.5: keyword first-pass against configurable surface-lexicon + haiku classifier on ambiguous matches. Fire static probe set once per UI epic via per-epic flag. Classifier dispatch failure falls through to non-UI. Probe set stored as structured list; classifier interface is mockable.","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["UI intent detection runs on confirmed Summary via keyword first-pass + haiku classifier.","Classifier dispatch failure falls through to non-UI with logged degradation.","Regression test covers clear UI / clear non-UI / ambiguous-with-mocked-failure.","UX probe set runs once per UI epic, setting flag at $ARTIFACTS_DIR/ux-probe-fired-<epic-id>.","Flag is ISO-8601 sentinel; persists across re-invocations for same epic ID; not cleaned by $ARTIFACTS_DIR sweep.","Non-UI features skip probe set; bounded to one keyword scan + zero classifier calls when unambiguous.","Regression test with non-UI seed asserts classifier dispatch code path is not entered.","Static probe set is structured list (array of {id, dimension, prompt, example_good, example_bad}).","Classifier dispatch interface is named mockable boundary (env var or script seam).","brainstorm.ui_keywords override semantics specified (replace default) with regression tests.","Unit tests written and passing."],"considerations":["[Testing] Mock-compatible classifier interface.","[Reliability] Classifier failure fall-through with logged degradation.","[Performance] Non-UI path short-circuits to zero classifier calls.","[Maintainability] Forward-compatibility with aaa1-7100 via structured probe list.","[Implicit shared state] Flag file under $ARTIFACTS_DIR must be excluded from cleanup sweeps."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["2161-b788"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC2, SC3, SC6"},{"id":"8e8d-1c46","title":"As a developer using /dso:brainstorm, Phase 1 Gate loops back to Tell Me More on intent gaps with bounded termination","description":"Amend Phase 1 Gate so Gate Step 2 + UX probe checkpoint loop back on intent gap. Termination requires empty gap list + same-turn Summary confirmation. Loop-back consumes probe checkpoint by named symbol. When anti-redundancy suppresses all candidates, record UNRESOLVABLE_INTENT_GAP and terminate.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Gate Step 2 loops back on intent gap.","UX probe checkpoint loops back on intent gap.","Termination requires empty gap list AND same-turn confirmation; no numeric cap.","Loop-back consumes UX probe checkpoint by named symbol (forward-compat with aaa1-7100).","When anti-redundancy suppresses all candidates, record UNRESOLVABLE_INTENT_GAP + terminate.","Unit tests written and passing."],"considerations":["[Reliability] Loop-back bounded by termination discipline + anti-redundancy + UNRESOLVABLE_INTENT_GAP escape.","[Maintainability] Preserve existing Gate structure."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["7616-cd63"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC4"},{"id":"d7f4-0f20","title":"As a developer using /dso:brainstorm, a top-level anti-redundancy directive prevents duplicate questions","description":"Top-level anti-redundancy directive in brainstorm SKILL.md requiring semantic check of prior turns (paraphrase + negative signals) and codebase check (Grep/Read/Glob) before forming any question. Duplicate questions prohibited. Regression test seeds answered probe topic and asserts probe suppression.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["SKILL.md carries top-level anti-redundancy directive with semantic + codebase check.","Regression test asserts one UX probe is suppressed when its topic is pre-answered.","Unit tests written and passing."],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Directive top-level so it applies across all phases.","[Testing] S6 seed must not pre-answer any probe (cross-reference with S6).","[Interaction with S3] Anti-redundancy suppressing all candidates triggers S3's UNRESOLVABLE_INTENT_GAP escape."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["7616-cd63"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC5"},{"id":"7e54-6453","title":"As a CI operator running /dso:brainstorm non-interactively, UX probes defer cleanly with a ui_probes:deferred tag","description":"Non-interactive branch in Phase 1 Step 2.5: skip probes, emit INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED, tag epic ui_probes:deferred. Also bypass S3's Gate loop-back on UX-probe-sourced gaps so Phase 1 terminates cleanly in CI.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["BRAINSTORM_INTERACTIVE=false skips UX probe set entirely.","Emits INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: UX probes require user input; tags epic ui_probes:deferred.","Non-interactive mode bypasses both probe set AND Gate loop-back on UX-probe-sourced gaps.","Regression test with BRAINSTORM_INTERACTIVE=false on UI seed asserts tag present + probes not asked + Phase 1 terminates.","Unit tests written and passing."],"considerations":["[Reliability] Follow existing interaction:deferred tag pattern; tag name distinct.","[Dependency] Requires S3's loop-back to exist before non-interactive bypass attaches."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["7616-cd63","8e8d-1c46"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC7"},{"id":"b7fe-5968","title":"As a maintainer, the brainstorm UX probe loop has an end-to-end dogfooding regression test","description":"Add regression test invoking Phase 1 on UI seed ('add a benefits-status dashboard for claimants'), stubs haiku classifier via S2's mockable interface to return 'ui', asserts Surface bullet + 3 probes asked + probe answers in ticket description.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Test file exists at chosen path (tests/skills/brainstorm/ or flat tests/skills/test-brainstorm-*), executable, passes.","Test stubs classifier via S2 mockable interface to 'ui' + asserts Surface bullet.","Test asserts all 3 UX probes (interaction criticality, non-happy-path state, flow entry/exit) asked.","Test asserts probe answers in ticket description (inline or ## UX Probes section).","Seed crafted so no probe topic is pre-answered (S4 anti-redundancy suppression would fail SC8).","Unit tests written and passing."],"considerations":["[Testing] Mock-compatible \u2014 stub classifier, do not invoke live.","[Testing] Seed must not pre-answer any of 3 probe topics (cross-reference with S4).","[Path convention] Existing tests flat at tests/skills/; SC8 wording suggests subdir \u2014 document chosen path in file header."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["2161-b788","7616-cd63","8e8d-1c46","d7f4-0f20","7e54-6453"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC8"},{"id":"16b9-68f1","title":"As a developer running /dso:preplanning on a ui_probes:deferred epic, preplanning blocks until brainstorm completes interactively","description":"Add 'UI Probes Deferred Gate' to plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md \u2014 halt when epic has ui_probes:deferred tag, direct user to re-run brainstorm interactively. Mirror existing Scrutiny Gate / Interaction Conflict Gate patterns. Presence-based check; fail-open on ticket show failure.","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["preplanning SKILL.md has UI Probes Deferred Gate halting on ui_probes:deferred.","Presence-based check; proceeds when absent/empty; fail-open on ticket show failure.","Regression test asserts halt when tag present + pass through when absent.","Unit tests written and passing."],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Match Scrutiny Gate / Interaction Conflict Gate patterns.","[Consumer impact] Closes enforcement loop for SC7 deferred tag."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["7e54-6453"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC7 (enforcement)"},{"id":"d556-8528","title":"Update project docs to reflect brainstorm UX probe loop and preplanning gate","description":"Update CLAUDE.md architecture section + CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md to reflect new brainstorm Phase 1 behavior (Surface dimension, Step 2.5 probe set, loop-back, anti-redundancy, ui_probes:deferred tag) and new brainstorm.ui_keywords config key. Follow DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md. No new doc files.","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["CLAUDE.md reflects Step 2 Surface dimension, Step 2.5 probe set, Gate loop-back, anti-redundancy, ui_probes:deferred lifecycle.","CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents brainstorm.ui_keywords (default, replace-vs-merge, example override).","CLAUDE.md documents that ui_probes:deferred is consumed by preplanning gate (S8); no other enforcement consumers in this epic."],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md.","[Consumer impact] Documents enforcement boundary (preplanning only)."],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["2161-b788","7616-cd63","8e8d-1c46","d7f4-0f20","7e54-6453","b7fe-5968","16b9-68f1"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC1-SC7 (traceability)"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":8,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["2161-b788","7616-cd63","8e8d-1c46","7e54-6453","16b9-68f1","d7f4-0f20","b7fe-5968","d556-8528"]}}
